reviews.review_description: Hello! I really liked the game, but there are still some bugs. The strangest bug is related to the cameras in the game. When I click on any number on the camera monitor, the game crashes. Also, please fix the bug with the monster named Gus, because in the final blue and white room, Gus turns completely black. Could you please change the name of the game to Lethal Ape VR? You could also add a VERY cool feature: when entering the game, the inscription “Welcome to gorilla nostalgia” would appear, or if you change the name of the game (I would really like that), then when entering the game, the inscription “Welcome to lethal ape” would appear, and most importantly, when the inscription appears, the music Tophats N' Tools - Solar.mp3 would play. (ChimpLab VR OST). You could also add a new monster to the game (if possible), named “gisser.” It would be completely black with small white eyes and would play the song Wake Up The Prisedent. Thank you very much! I'll be waiting for the new update.)
Bro this game was so fun cool mechanics and im the first one to try! Would really be fun with friends
